title: SARS-CoV-2 Detection with ApharSeq
author: Daphna Strauss
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bkdcks2w
materials: Air dry to remove traces of ethanol 00:04:00
Magnetzie and transfer 21 µl to new tube
Demultiplex pool indices with the bcl2fastq script (Illumina)

steps.title: Prepare poly dT beads Use 5...
steps.instruction: Prepare poly dT beads Use 5 µl poly dT beads/sample Wash beads twice in binding buffer: 2.1 Resuspend in binding buffer 2.2 Magnetize and remove buffer 3. Resuspend beads in 320 µl binding buffer

steps.title: Hybridization to beads Add 320 µl...
steps.instruction: Hybridization to beads Add 320 µl inactivated viral sample to 320 µl beads in binding buffer Incubate 00:10:00 at Room temperature while mixing Magnetize and remove supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend beads in 50 µl 1:1...
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads in 50 µl 1:1 mix of binding buffer and 10 µM RT primer(s)

steps.title: Heat sample to 72 °C for...
steps.instruction: Heat sample to 72 °C for 00:02:00 then incubate On ice for at least 00:02:00

steps.title: Incubate samples 00:10:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate samples 00:10:00 at Room temperature . Mix by rotating or by pipetting every 5 minutes

steps.title: Resuspend beads in 450 µl wash buffer A
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads in 450 µl wash buffer A

steps.title: Resuspend beads in remaining 70µl and pool samples
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads in remaining 70µl and pool samples.

steps.title: Wash beads twice in wash buffer B
steps.instruction: Wash beads twice in wash buffer B: 2.1 Resuspend in 500 µl buffer B 2.2 Magnetize and carfully remove buffer Pool can be stored in RNA later at 4 °C for a week. If stored, prior to step 5, wash twice in Wash buffer B

steps.title: Reverse Transcription Magnetize PCR tube and...
steps.instruction: Reverse Transcription Magnetize PCR tube and wash pooled beads in 1x RT buffer: 1.1 Resuspend in 50 µl 1xRT buffer 1.2 Magnetize and remove buffer 2. Resuspend in 50 µl RT reaction mix 3. Incubate 00:15:00 25 °C 00:45:00 42 °C 00:15:00 70 °C We also found a standard RT-PCR kit to work on the beads ( PrimeScript™ One Step RT-PCR ). Importantly we execute the RT part of the reaction, and only then add the PCR primers.

steps.title: cDNA elution 1
steps.instruction: cDNA elution 1. Incubate the beads for 00:02:00 at 98 °C 2. Magnetize and transfer the supenatant immediately to a new tube

steps.title: Add 100 µl SPRI beads and mix well
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl SPRI beads and mix well

steps.title: Incubate 00:04:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:04:00

steps.title: Magnetize
steps.instruction: Magnetize: keep on magnet for 00:04:00 and remove supernatant

steps.title: Keep on magnet and wash twice with 70% ethanol 4
steps.instruction: Keep on magnet and wash twice with 70% ethanol 4.1 Add 100 µl 70% ethanol 4.2 Incubate 00:00:30 4.3 Remove the ethanol without disturbing the beads

steps.title: Resuspend in 23 µl 10 mM Tris 8
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 23 µl 10 mM Tris 8.0

steps.title: Incubate 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:02:00

steps.title: Library PCR 1
steps.instruction: Library PCR 1. Add to each sample pool 25 µl Kapa RM 2 µl 10 µM PCR-primer F 2 µl 10 µM PCR-primer R 2. PCR program: 98°C 3 minutes 30 x {95°C 20sec, 59°C 15sec, 72°C 50sec}; 72°C 10 min 10°C

steps.title: Cleanup by 1x SPRI (see step...
steps.instruction: Cleanup by 1x SPRI (see step 8) Elute in 15 µl 10 mM Tris 8.0

steps.title: Library assessment 1
steps.instruction: Library assessment 1. Determine library concentration (e.g. by Qubit) and size (by tape/gel) 2. If necessary, clean primer dimers by running on gel or by 1x SPRI

steps.title: Sequence On an Illumina machine
steps.instruction: Sequence On an Illumina machine. Assign 5 million reads per 100 sample pool. Assign at least 20 cycles to R1 (barcode + UMI) and either additional 30 cycles to R1 or 30 cycles to R2

steps.title: Process each fastq file independently 2
steps.instruction: Process each fastq file independently 2.1 Split reads based on RT primer target (E/N1/ActB) and barcode (R1:4-8 + R1:13-17, inclusive) 2.2 Filter reads that do not exhibit their expected sequence i.e. read with E primer should have the E sequence immediately after the primer 2.2 Collect UMI sequence per read (R1:1-4 + R1:9-12 + R1:18-
2.3 Cluster UMI sequences (e.g. by hamming distance and/or with UMI-tools ) 2.4 Report unique molecules per target/sample

steps.title: Proteinase K (PK) treatment Wash with...
steps.instruction: Proteinase K (PK) treatment Wash with 500 µl PK buffer Resuspend in 500 µl PK mix (0.4mg/ml PK in PK bufer) Incubate 01:00:00 at Room temperature while rotating. Magnetize and wash three times in 1ml wash buffer A Magnetize and wash twice in 1ml wash buffer B This step may need calibration to shorten incubation time at RT or 37C
